changelog: v5.1.1: FAST Benchmark, System Score, and Tuning delta results now render as 1200 x 675 branded image cards ready to paste into Discord, post to X with a pre-filled caption, or save as a PNG. The home page has been fully reworked around three clearly-delineated columns (DETECT / TUNE / MAINTAIN) with per-column colour, a connected workflow strip across the top, per-component bars on the Hardware Rating and FAST Benchmark tiles, an auto-scanning Event Log tile no longer capped at 3 findings, a renamed Automated Routines tile adding Disk Cleanup and Filesystem Check, and a unified rainbow-gradient progress bar style. Hardware Rating and Bottleneck tiles now route through the same analyzer so every bottleneck line on the page agrees. Five new detection signals arrive: HyperPolling mouse detection extended to 4 and 8 kHz (fixes WLMOUSE Ying / Sword reading as "Waiting -- move mouse" forever), MPO alt-tab diagnostic on Win11 24H2+ multi-monitor systems (keep-enabled-by-default framing; disabling MPO costs 1% lows on CPU-bound titles per FAST benchmarks), NIC offload silent-failure verify for Realtek drivers that ignore offload cmdlets, OptScore Failing-only filter that collapses empty stages, and sync-app detection (OneDrive / Dropbox / Google Drive) extended from Gameplay into Debloat. Benchmark page gains an editable NOTE column for tagging runs, a fixed tier hint, HIGH-priority subprocess launch so ProBalance can't demote it, and AMD / Intel now skip the NVIDIA-only P-State check. NEW badges appear on cards added each minor release. Locked home tiles now open an upgrade modal on click.
